structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-29 FNMA Blended Score Reminder
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-29 12:18:21-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

To ensure our Production Team captures opportunities where borrowers fall outside of posted guidelines, Capital Markets is recirculating the following information regarding Fannie Mae blended FICO scores. Effective 2021, Fannie Mae may permit blended FICO scores when one of the borrower’s scores is below 620. DU will “blend” or average the median FICO scores of both borrowers. This can result in a blended score above the 620 minimum, potentially allowing the loan to be eligible even when one borrower’s individual median score falls below the threshold. 

 

Example: 

Borrower #1: 610 FICO

Borrower #2: 700 FICO

Blended Score: 655 FICO

 

In this situation, you may proceed if AUS findings come back as an Approve/Eligible, even though Borrower #1 has a score lower than 620. 

 

Please note that DU considers compensating factors to determine if blended FICO scores are permitted. When one of the scores is lower than 620, the loan is eligible only if findings are returned as Approve/Eligible. 

 

IMPORTANT NOTES

Lock Desk will price the loan at a 620 score, using Fannie Mae pricing only. Please notify Lock Desk that you have a blended FICO so that it may be priced correctly and delivered to FNMA. 

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Marketing
*	Updated NOVA Overlays
*	2024 FNMA Blended Score Reminder

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
